info.description: Public and internal REST API for aion-api. Swagger (OpenAPI 3.x) is generated via swaggo.
info.title: aion-api — REST API Documentation

put.description: Blocks a user by assigning blocked role. Cannot block users with equal or higher privilege.

403.description: Forbidden - cannot block user with equal/higher privilege

put.description: Removes admin role from a user. Only admins and owners can demote.
Adds admin role to a user. Only admins and owners can promote to admin.

Generic role update endpoint with minimal hierarchy validation.
**DEPRECATED**: Prefer specific endpoints for better validation:
- PUT /admin/users/{id}/promote-admin (adds admin role)
- PUT /admin/users/{id}/demote-admin (removes admin role)
- PUT /admin/users/{id}/block (blocks user)
- PUT /admin/users/{id}/unblock (unblocks user)
This endpoint provides maximum flexibility but less validation.
Use only for special administrative operations or bulk scripts.
Unblocks a user by restoring default user role.

post.description: Validates credentials and issues a session token (JWT or cookie). On success, returns user-facing info and sets `auth_token` cookie.

Set-Cookie.description: auth_token=<opaque or JWT>; Path=/; HttpOnly; Secure (if enabled)

400.description: Invalid request payload or validation error

post.description: Invalidates the current authenticated session (token or cookie) and clears the auth cookie.

Set-Cookie.description: auth_token=deleted; Path=/; Max-Age=0; HttpOnly; Secure (if enabled)

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's session snapshot (user identity + roles). Intended for UIs.

post.description: Sends an audio file to be transcribed and processed by the AI assistant. Requires authentication.

parameters.description: Audio file (webm, wav, mp3, max 10MB, max 60s)
parameters.name: audio

parameters.description: Language code (pt, en, es) or auto-detect if empty
parameters.name: language

parameters.description: Optional runtime provider override (for example: openai, ollama)
parameters.name: provider

parameters.description: Optional runtime model override when provider is present
parameters.name: model

200.description: Voice chat response with transcription and AI response

400.description: Invalid audio file or validation error

503.description: Service unavailable - AI service is down

post.description: Cancels ongoing AI processing for the current authenticated user.

503.description: Service unavailable - AI service is down

post.description: Sends a message to the AI assistant and receives a response. Requires authentication.

400.description: Invalid request payload or validation error

503.description: Service unavailable - AI service is down

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile fields. At least one field must be provided.

400.description: Invalid request or no fields to update

delete.description: Marks the current authenticated user as soft-deleted and clears the auth cookie. Returns 204 No Content.

Set-Cookie.description: auth_token=deleted; Path=/; Max-Age=0; HttpOnly; Secure (if enabled)

get.description: Returns a list containing all user resources.

delete.description: Removes the authenticated user's avatar and returns the updated profile payload.

post.description: Uploads an avatar image (PNG/JPEG/WEBP) and returns a URL payload suitable for user create/update.
Registers a new user account. On success, returns basic user information.

400.description: Invalid request payload or validation error

put.description: Validates the current password and updates it to a new one. On success, the auth cookie is refreshed.

400.description: Invalid request payload or validation error

get.description: Returns a single user resource by its unique identifier.

message.example: Quanto de água eu bebi hoje?

response.example: Você bebeu 2.5 litros de água hoje...

avatar_url.description:
AvatarURL is an optional URL for the user's avatar.
Example: "https://example.com/avatar.png"

bio.description:
Bio is an optional short bio for the user.
Example: "Backend engineer passionate about observability."

email.description:
Email is the user's contact email address.
Example: "dev@aion.local"

locale.description:
Locale is the optional user locale (e.g., "en-US").
Example: "en-US"

location.description:
Location is the optional user location.
Example: "São Paulo, BR"

name.description:
Name is the human-friendly display name of the user.
Example: "João Pereira"

password.description:
Password is the user's credential (minimum length: 8).
Example: "P@ssw0rd123"

timezone.description:
Timezone is the optional user timezone (IANA format).
Example: "America/Sao_Paulo"

username.description:
Username is the unique handle for login and identification.
Example: "lechitz"

email.description:
Email is the created user's email address.
Example: "dev@aion.local"

id.description:
ID is the created user's identifier.
Example: 42

name.description:
Name is the created user's display name.
Example: "João Pereira"

username.description:
Username is the created user's unique handle.
Example: "lechitz"

created_at.description:
CreatedAt is the timestamp when the user was created.
Format: date-time. Example: "2024-01-02T15:04:05Z".

email.description:
Email is the user's email address.
Example: "joaopereira@aion.local".

name.description:
Name is the user's display name.
Example: "João Pereira".

user_id.description:
ID is the user's identifier.
Example: 42.

username.description:
Username is the user's unique handle.
Example: "joaopereira".

password.description:
Password is the credential paired with the username.
Example: "P@ssw0rd123"

username.description:
Username is the unique identifier used to authenticate the user.
Example: "joaopereira"

id.description:
ID is the unique identifier for the authenticated user.
Example: 42

name.description:
Name is a friendly display name for the authenticated user.
Example: "João Pereira"

token.description:
Token is the JSON Web Token used for authenticating subsequent requests.
Example: "eyJhbGciOi..."

authenticated.description: Authenticated indicates whether the request is authenticated.

email.description: Email is the email address of the authenticated user.

expires_at.description: ExpiresAt is the access token expiration time (if available).

name.description: Name is a friendly display name for the authenticated user.

roles.description: Roles are the user's role names (authorization snapshot).

user_id.description: UserID is the unique identifier for the authenticated user.

username.description: Username is the unique username for the authenticated user.

new_password.description:
NewPassword is the new password to be set.
Example: "N3wP@ssw0rd456"

password.description:
Password is the current password for the user.
Example: "P@ssw0rd123"

avatar_url.description: AvatarURL is an optional URL for the user's avatar.

bio.description: Bio is an optional short bio for the user.

email.description:
Email is the new email address for the user.
Example: "alice@example.com"

location.description: Location is an optional city/country description.

name.description:
Name is the new display name for the user.
Example: "Alice Doe"

onboarding_completed.description: OnboardingCompleted indicates if the user has completed the onboarding flow.

username.description:
Username is the new unique handle for the user.
Example: "alice"

email.description:
Email is the current email after the update (if changed).
Example: "alice@example.com"

name.description:
Name is the current display name after the update (if changed).
Example: "Alice Doe"

onboarding_completed.description: OnboardingCompleted indicates if the user has completed the onboarding flow.

updated_at.description:
UpdatedAt is the timestamp when the user was updated.
Example: "2025-09-14T22:01:02Z"

user_id.description:
ID is the user's unique identifier.
Example: 42

username.description:
Username is the current username after the update (if changed).
Example: "alice"

roles.description:
Roles is the list of roles to assign to the user.
Valid roles: "user", "admin", "blocked"
Example: ["user", "admin"]

email.description:
Email is the user's email.
Example: "alice@example.com"

roles.description:
Roles is the updated list of roles.
Example: ["user", "admin"]

updated_at.description:
UpdatedAt is the timestamp when the user was updated.
Example: "2025-09-14T22:01:02Z"

user_id.description:
ID is the user's unique identifier.
Example: 42

username.description:
Username is the user's username.
Example: "alice"

CookieAuth.name: auth_token
CookieAuth.x-graphqlplayground: /graphql/ // Cross-reference to GraphQL Playground (not covered by Swagger)
